profile.name: NX Adaptive Modules 2512.6000
profile.description: Basic global shortcuts plus context-adaptive module commands for Siemens NX 2512.

keyboard.notes: Удалить выбранное; команда NX запрашивает подтверждение при необходимости

commands.notes: Open Sheet Metal application when current context is not Sketch.
Move selected objects to another layer.
Assign physical material to selected geometry.
Control visible layers in the current view.
Copy selected objects to another layer.
Open materials currently stored in the part.
Remove visual material override from selected objects.
Convert solid body workflow into Sheet Metal.
Create or edit sheet body feature.
